title: Copilot Cowork 全球正式可用，支持多模型
full_text:
Satya Nadella on X: "Copilot Cowork is now generally available worldwide, now with multi-model support!
Every organization can put long-running agents to work on complex, multi-step tasks, grounded in your organization's unique knowledge and know-how. https://t.co/1fJNjGOs5o" / X
